data.title: Nasdaq surges over 100 points, M&T Bank reports upbeat earnings with $4.72 per share, beating estimates on $2.475 billion revenue.
data.description: Stocks in the U.S. saw positive trading this morning, highlighted by the Nasdaq Composite jumping over 100 points on Friday. At the opening of the market on Friday, the Dow increased by 0.13% reaching 49,508.69, the NASDAQ surged by 0.51% to 23,649.47, and the S&P 500 also saw a rise of 0.28% reaching 6,963.79. Information technology shares were among the leading sectors, gaining 0.9%, while utilities stocks dipped by 1.2%. In related news, M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) exceeded expectations for the fourth quarter with quarterly earnings of $4.72 per share, above the analyst consensus of $4.47 per share, and posted quarterly sales of $2.475 billion, surpassing the estimated $2.474 billion. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Carlisle Companies (NYSE: CSL) named "Most Honored Company" by Extel for 3rd year. First place in 7/8 categories in Homebuilders & Building Products industry.
data.description: Scottsdale-based company, Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE: CSL), has been acknowledged as one of the top-ranking companies by Extel’s 2025 All-America Executive Team rankings. The company achieved first place in 7 out of 8 categories in the Homebuilders & Building Products sector for the third consecutive year. This recognition highlights the strong performance of Carlisle, showcasing its success and reputation within the investment community.

data.title: Arctos appoints Santiago López-Vilas as Operating Partner to provide strategic counsel for sports franchises.
data.description: Dallas-based investment firm Arctos has appointed Santiago López-Vilas as an Operating Partner, who will provide strategic guidance to Arctos Sports and Arctos Keystone. Arctos specializes in offering tailored growth and liquidity solutions to sports franchises and alternative asset managers. Operating Partners like López-Vilas play a crucial role in advising on sports strategy, drawing on their expertise to benefit both the firm and its portfolio companies. This appointment highlights Arctos' commitment to enhancing its services and leveraging industry knowledge.

data.title: Trump unveils health care plan amidst rising prices and premiums. Plan includes payments to HSAs instead of subsidies.
data.description: The highly anticipated proposal defers many decisions to Congress and includes provisions for directing payments to health savings accounts instead of providing insurance subsidies, among other overarching ideas.

data.title: Colgate-Palmolive to webcast 2025 earnings call on Jan 30, 2026 at 8:30 a.m. ET with CEO, CFO, and Investor Relations, NYSE: CL.
data.description: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) has announced that it will be hosting a live webcast of its 2025 fourth quarter and full year earnings conference call on Friday, January 30, 2026, starting at 8:30 a.m. ET. The call will feature Chairman, President, and CEO Noel Wallace, Chief Financial Officer Stan Sutula, and Chief Investor Relations Officer and EVP M&A John Faucher. Interested investors can tune in to the live audio webcast on Colgate's website at. Along with the live webcast, the company will also release the earnings press release and prepared materials for the event.

data.title: Kinderhook Industries finalizes $1B waste services deal with Goldman Sachs and Apollo S3.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in New York, Kinderhook Industries, LLC, a prominent middle market private equity firm, completed a single-asset continuation vehicle deal for Ecowaste Solutions. Ecowaste, a recently established waste services company, was the focus of this transaction.

data.title: LHV Group acquired its own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange from 09.-15.01.2026.
data.description: During the week of January 9th-15th, 2026, LHV Group disclosed the acquisition of its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.

data.title: 2025 Q4: Sales revenue €239.2M (-6.8% YoY), Profit before tax €8.3M (-4.9% YoY); 2025 total revenue €919.6M (-2.6% YoY), profit €24.3M (-31.4% YoY).
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, the Group reported consolidated unaudited sales revenue of 239.2 million euros, marking a 6.8% decrease from the previous year. The total unaudited sales revenue for the entire year of 2025 was 919.6 million euros, showing a 2.6% decline compared to 2024's 944.6 million euros. Additionally, the Group's consolidated unaudited profit before tax for Q4 of 2025 stood at 8.3 million euros, down by 4.9 million euros from the same period in 2024. The profit before tax for the full year 2025 was 24.3 million euros, reflecting a significant 31.4% decrease from the previous year.

data.title: Legal tech unicorn Harvey AI transforms design system to facilitate quick product growth across various platforms, including web, mobile, and Microsoft Office.
data.description: To accommodate rapid product expansion across web, mobile, and Microsoft Office platforms, Harvey AI completely revamped its design infrastructure. This strategic move will enable the company to scale efficiently and effectively.

data.title: Investors warned about Coupang, Inc. (CPNG) data breach suit, lead plaintiff deadline on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: A national shareholder rights firm, Hagens Berman, has informed investors in Coupang, Inc. (NYSE: CPNG) about the approaching lead plaintiff deadline in a securities class action lawsuit against the company and specific executives. The deadline for the lead plaintiff is set for February 17, 2026.

data.title: Vaximm AG appoints Dr. Wieckowski as CSO to lead oral T-cell immunotherapies for cancer. Jan. 16, 2026.
data.description: A key development in the field of cancer treatment was announced today by Vaximm AG, a subsidiary of OSR Holdings, Inc., based in Bellevue, Washington. The company, known for its oral T-cell immunotherapies, welcomed Sébastien Wieckowski, PhD, as their new Chief Scientific Officer (CSO). This strategic appointment is aimed at enhancing the company's research and development efforts in the fight against cancer. The appointment signals a significant step forward in Vaximm AG's mission to innovate in cancer treatment.
